description: Ambiguity rules binding primary-flow telemetry to clarification journeys. Each rule maps to explicit triggers in Routing Matrix V2.

rules.name: Cross-method divergence
rules.why: High SJT but low affect-reading (or reverse) — single method unreliable
rules.was_wrong: Trigger existed but not bound to rule ID; fusion could average conflicting methods
rules.improved: Rule ID logged; J1 forced-choice + Read-the-Room sim mandatory when U1 fires

rules.name: Sim vs rubric conflict
rules.condition: team_chat_cooperation_score >= 0.7 AND conflict_branch_style IN (compete, avoid) AND z_diff > 1.0
rules.why: Team sim shows cooperation but conflict path shows compete/avoid
rules.was_wrong: Vague TEAM-COOP vs CONF-CMP divergence string
rules.improved: Quantified z-diff on sim-derived subscores; J2-V2 items stratified by fired subconstruct

rules.name: Speed vs quality
rules.condition: in_tray_tau < 0.5 AND in_tray_time_to_first_action < p25 AND trap_rank <= 2
rules.why: Fast triage but wrong priority on trap items
rules.was_wrong: Tau threshold only; no speed interaction
rules.improved: Composite U3 index; skip full in-tray re-run if Ph.1 tau >= 0.7 (U17)

rules.name: Deliberation paradox
rules.condition: two_doors_clues >= 2 AND time_to_decide < 8s OR two_doors_clues = 0 AND time_to_decide > 120s
rules.why: Maximiser clues with impulsive decide, or avoidance without deciding
rules.improved: Explicit clue-time interaction matrix for Two Doors re-run

rules.name: Integrity vs resume boast
rules.why: Behavioural integrity signal conflicts with claimed expertise
rules.was_wrong: Adequate but not tied to resume AI cluster weights
rules.improved: Resume mismatch now explicit trigger; Honest Dice +2 trials on U5

rules.name: Values/path ambiguous
rules.condition: path_branch_conf < 0.65 OR trade_off_entropy > 0.85 OR abs(ent_signal - job_signal) < 0.12
rules.why: Flat allocation or near-equal job vs intrapreneur signals
rules.was_wrong: Entropy rule underspecified in Trade-off Island
rules.improved: Normalized OWV vector + entropy threshold; Trade-off Island clar mandatory

rules.name: Domain vs resume
rules.condition: eco_accuracy < 0.60 OR resume_sector_mismatch = true OR expert_challenge_accuracy < 0.55
rules.why: Applied domain knowledge does not match claimed sector/role
rules.improved: Expert Challenge + Ecosystem Architect clar sims added to J6 path

rules.name: Ecosystem trend misalignment
rules.why: Candidate misses sector-specific 2026 forces despite role claim
rules.improved: U8 binds Trend Radar re-fire with role-weighted decoys

rules.name: Work style triangulation gap
rules.why: Work Styles Arena vs SJT workstyle signals disagree
rules.was_wrong: Work Styles Arena absent from clar library
rules.improved: SIM-WORK-STYLES-ARENA-CLAR added; OWC forced-choice pair included

rules.name: Validity band caution
rules.condition: validity_band = interpret_with_caution OR attention_fail = true OR long_string_flag = true
rules.was_wrong: J4 forced but could be displaced by 2-journey cap
rules.improved: U10 always occupies one journey slot; downweights likert_residual to 0.3

rules.name: Stress construct split
rules.condition: crisis_commander_accuracy >= 0.7 AND in_tray_stress_index < -0.3 OR inverse pattern
rules.why: Performance under timer vs sustained inbox load diverge
rules.improved: Formal stress_split_index = z(crisis) - z(in_tray); Pressure Cooker alt if U17

rules.name: Negotiation unknown
rules.condition: neg_sim_telemetry_missing = true OR conf(NEG-SKILL) < 0.65 OR NEGT_likert_used_for_negotiation = true
rules.why: Primary NEGT Likert measured affect not negotiation; sim may never fire
rules.was_wrong: NEGT-001..008 irritability items in primary bank fused to negotiation
rules.improved: NEG-SKILL construct; NEGT blocked from negotiation dimension; SIM-NEGOTIATION-NPC-V2 required

rules.name: Learning agility rule-change failure
rules.why: Cannot adapt when task rules or format shift mid-flow
rules.was_wrong: Only 3 LRN-FB tags in J1; no Format Lab clar pathway
rules.improved: Dedicated J7 journey + SIM-FORMAT-LAB-CLAR (1 rule-change module)

rules.name: Aptitude vs problem-solving split
rules.condition: method_divergence_z(APT, SS-PS) > 1.0 OR cat_theta_verbal vs ss_ps_verbal z > 1.2
rules.why: CAT aptitude disagrees with applied problem-solving SJTs
rules.improved: J8 micro-CAT (4-6 items, stop SE<=0.35); refusion with cat weight 0.95

rules.name: Accommodation required
rules.why: Timed EQ/stress tasks adverse impact on neurodivergent candidates
rules.improved: Global modifier; U15 logged on all clar telemetry

rules.name: Item exposure limit
rules.why: J2 coaching on repeated stems; overclaiming fake memorisation
rules.improved: Cross-session exposure counter; alternate pools J2-V2-A/B, NEG-V2-A/B, fake-concept-rotate

rules.name: Simulation repetition guard
rules.why: Duplicate in-tray causes fatigue without new evidence
rules.was_wrong: In-tray mini always injected on J3 trigger
rules.improved: Conditional sim substitution based on primary performance

multi_trigger_handling.extended_when: U10 OR (U5 AND U12) OR (U4 AND U11 AND U10) OR fired_rule_count >= 4
slot_allocation: Reserve slot 1: highest priority forced journey (U10, U5, U12)
Slot 2: next highest priority unique journey
Slot 3 (extended): next unique journey not yet covered
multi_trigger_handling.dedupe: Never run two journeys sharing >50% construct overlap unless U10 forces J4
